calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-12-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-12-2004 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Settlement.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lesley Schneider.
Daniel Bornstein, Esq., for Plaintiff: Carlos Abela, also present.
Gen Fujioko, Esq., for Defendant: Xiang Xuan aka Wen Ziang Zuan aka Wen Xuan. Defendant Li Nu He is present with Guardian Ad Litem, Wan Guing Lai and Cantonese Interpreter, Bonnie Shiu.
012:00 a.m. - Parties have settled, to be reduced to writing for Stipulation for Entry of Future Judgment. Essential terms read into the record as follows:
Defendants to tender rent due in the amount of $3,400.00 to plaintiff.
The lease agreement and prior rental agreements will be executed with a written declaration.
Defendant, Xuan to provides three sample of signatures to plaintiff.
Parties understand, agreed and signed the Stipulation, Court approved.
Matter is deemed settled, Trial date vacated.
